array_types.name: Node_Set
array_types.code: type Node_Set is array (Positive range <>) of Real;

subtypes.name: Natural_Real
subtypes.code: subtype Natural_Real  is Real range 0.0              .. Real'Safe_Last;

subtypes.name: Positive_Real
subtypes.code: subtype Positive_Real is Real range Real'Model_Small .. Real'Safe_Last;

packages.name: REM_NN
